events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: temporary bracing removed before decking/permanent stability. This is a safety hazard under OSHA 1926 Subpart R. Work is rough-complete, 70% complete until defects corrected. Decision should be fail because dangerous/non-compliant.
